sources_exist.note: All 10 canonical HTTP(S) citation occurrences resolve to identifiable sources. The initially unrendered ISG URL resolves to the same June 2025 ISG brochure when its server-provided query suffix is followed.

figures_match_sources.note: Only broad component facts are findable. The sources do not establish the score-driving 22% adoption, 10-year analog, 35% industry owner age, 3 consolidators, 5.5x buy multiple, 10.5x exit multiple, or stated billing percentages for NAICS 541513.

judgment_inputs_plausible.note: The within-role fractions are bounded and rationalized, and pi_dist/pi_moat are in bounds, but t50_years=7 is derived from a current-adoption value and historical endpoints absent from the cited sources. pi_dist=0.30 also relies on an unsubstantiated claim that Kyndryl automation savings are contractually passed through. ESTIMATE_HEAVY: 3 inputs with quality ESTIMATE (active_consolidators, owners_60plus_pct, t50_years) is therefore unresolved, not cured by the labels.

rubric_consistent.note: The run applies the frozen formulas and the supplied non-null dataset inputs match exactly, but M uses broad IT-services deal-size medians and unsupported discretionary 541513 adjustments instead of actual small-target and platform evidence for this industry. BORDERLINE: |S - pass cut 3.00| = 0.1354 increases the need for support and is unresolved because multiple score-affecting citations fail. ARITH_DELTA_WITHIN_TOL: nonzero stored-vs-recomputed deltas on A, B, M, S, V, ai_replaceable_share is explicitly reviewed and is not independently disqualifying because Stage 4 found the deltas within tolerance.

cross_checks_honest.note: The uplift and terminal-class answers are candid, but the pricing-model cross-check presents a precise 50%/30%/20% billing mix and productivity-glidepath pass-through as established even though the cited SEC exhibit establishes internal automation savings, not those contract shares or pass-through. The no-proxy answer also describes 22% adoption as survey-derived although the cited page reports 54% enterprise monitoring adoption and 67% of MSPs offering monitoring, not 22% of 541513 firms materially adopting.

source_audits.note: The page identifies seven active MSP platforms and explicitly says its NAICS classification is primarily 541512, secondarily 541519. It does not identify or count three active PE-backed add-on platforms in NAICS 541513.

Aventis reports a 5.9x median for 89 IT-services deals below $5 million deal value, not a 5.5x median paid for $1-5 million EBITDA NAICS 541513 targets. The run's 5.5x industry adjustment is unsourced.

The secondary page reports 54% of enterprises using AI-powered monitoring in 2025, 67% of MSPs offering it, and a Gartner projection about network activity. It contains no 22% figure and does not measure material adoption by U.S. NAICS 541513 firms.

Aventis supports broad IT-services medians of 11.5x for $50-100 million deal value and 11.6x for $100-500 million. It does not establish a 10.5x recent exit multiple for $10 million-plus EBITDA NAICS 541513 platforms.

The page says 33% of enterprises ran more than half of workloads in cloud in 2021 and approximately 41% of workloads are now cloud-based. It does not provide the run's 2012 10% endpoint, 2022 50% endpoint, or an 8-12 year ITIL adoption cycle.

The Census page is based on the 2019 ABS, data year 2018, and supports only the broad statement that over half of U.S. owners were 55+. It does not support the attributed 2022 ABS shares or a 35% age-60-plus estimate for NAICS 541513.

The Kyndryl exhibit reports that Advanced Delivery freed more than 12,300 delivery professionals and generated approximately $725 million annualized savings. It does not say those savings were redeployed to clients, absorbed into lower contract value, or passed through via productivity glidepaths.

The FY2024 exhibit reports revenue decline and EBITDA improvement from the three-A initiatives, but contains no cited automation productivity glidepath, benchmarking clause, or finding that contract value fell because automation savings were passed to customers.

The June 2025 brochure describes managed-network services, AIOps, compliance, legacy modernization and sovereign-cloud needs. It does not establish the claimed shrinking on-prem facilities-management base, time-limited switching costs, or size of a declining regulated/legacy residue for NAICS 541513.

The SEC exhibit supports Kyndryl's internal automation savings, but not the claimed 50% fixed-fee/per-device, 30% time-and-materials, 20% cost-plus mix, the $50-100 pricing figures, 28% MSP share, or standard benchmarking/productivity commitments.

reasons: At inputs.current_adoption_pct.url (https://calliber.net/blog/trends-ai-operations-automation-tools), the cited source does not contain the score-driving 0.22 adoption rate for NAICS 541513. Re-run with a primary or clearly traceable industry-and-function-specific adoption measure, or a transparent ESTIMATE chain whose cited facts actually produce the value.

At inputs.historical_analogs.url (https://www.zippia.com/advice/cloud-adoption-statistics/), the cited page does not establish the claimed 2012-to-2022 10%-to-50% adoption interval. Re-run t50_years from documented analog endpoints with comparable populations and dates.

At inputs.active_consolidators.url (https://ctacquisitions.com/guides/private-equity-msp-2026/), the page covers platforms primarily classified in 541512/541519 and does not support three 541513 consolidators. Identify the specific qualifying PE-backed platforms and recent add-ons in this exact industry.

At inputs.buy_mult.url and inputs.exit_mult.url (https://aventis-advisors.com/it-services-valuation-multiples/), broad IT-services deal-size medians are adjusted to 5.5x and 10.5x without 541513 transaction evidence. Re-run using actual normalized small-target and $10 million-plus EBITDA platform transactions or credible exact-industry comps.

At inputs.owners_60plus_pct.url (https://www.census.gov/library/visualizations/2020/comm/business-owners-ages.html), a 2018 all-industry owner-age graphic is misattributed to 2022 and does not establish 35% for this code. Supply a dated industry-relevant owner-age source or a complete, correctly dated proxy derivation.

At inputs.pi_dist.sources[0], inputs.pi_dist.sources[1], and inputs.pricing_structure.url (the cited Kyndryl SEC exhibits), the record infers client pass-through and a precise 50%/30%/20% billing mix that the exhibits do not report. Supply contract or benchmark evidence for the pricing shares and automation-savings mechanism, then reassess the declared pi_dist rationale without prescribing a score.
flags_reviewed: ESTIMATE_HEAVY: 3 inputs with quality ESTIMATE (active_consolidators, owners_60plus_pct, t50_years)
ARITH_DELTA_WITHIN_TOL: nonzero stored-vs-recomputed deltas on A, B, M, S, V, ai_replaceable_share
